paper_title: LATTICE: Graph Self-Supervised Learning for Multimodal Spatial Omics Integration
human_review_reasons: implementation_assumptions confidence (0.58) is below the 0.65 stage-quality bar due to unresolved paper-internal inconsistencies (Eq.6 vs Appendix H loss form; alignment modality-pair scope) and undisclosed details (SARSIM cluster K).

Private, non-releasable dataset (11-sample melanoma cohort, 54,912 spots) has no public substitute at this exact 5-modality resolution -- numeric reproduction of Table 2/3 will not be possible; only architecture/training-mechanics reproduction on synthetic data is feasible.
6 unresolved ambiguities recorded, several affecting core loss functions used in Stage 4 code generation.

Stage 6 (Results Comparator) has not been run: no real cohort results are available to compare against Table 2/3, since the private dataset cannot be released. Repo has been validated end-to-end (train/evaluate/inference + both notebooks execute cleanly) on the synthetic data generator instead.
